name: coach_agent
description: AI learning coach for MuckeligAgentLMS. Explains concepts, quizzes learners, and tracks progress.

skills.name: Explain Concept
skills.description: Explains AI infrastructure topics at the learner's level.

skills.name: Quiz Learner
skills.description: Generates quiz questions on course material and provides feedback.

skills.name: Track Progress
skills.description: Summarizes learning progress and recommends next steps.
